allOf.title: macOSGeneralDeviceConfiguration

compliantAppsList.description: List of apps in the compliance (either allow list or block list, controlled by CompliantAppListType). This collection can contain a maximum of 10000 elements.

emailInDomainSuffixes.description: An email address lacking a suffix that matches any of these strings will be considered out-of-domain.

passwordExpirationDays.description: Number of days before the password expires.

passwordMinimumCharacterSetCount.description: Number of character sets a password must contain. Valid values 0 to 4

passwordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeLock.description: Minutes of inactivity required before a password is required.

passwordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeScreenT.description: Minutes of inactivity required before the screen times out.

passwordPreviousPasswordBlockCount.description: Number of previous passwords to block.

passwordRequired.description: Whether or not to require a password.

allOf.description: This topic provides descriptions of the declared methods, properties and relationships exposed by the macOSGeneralDeviceConfiguration resource.
